summary: Plan-only assessment for one open maintainer-ready PR. #90885 is focused and useful, but not merge-ready because mergeability is unknown, two checks are failing, comments/review comments were not hydrated, and no Codex /review merge proof is present. Recommend repairing the contributor branch.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR, but merge policy requires clean checks, known mergeability, resolved comments/bot comments, and passed Codex /review.
A bounded repair artifact gives the executor a merge-readiness path without mutating GitHub from plan mode.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair contributor PR #90885 so compaction runtime resolves bare compaction model aliases to canonical model refs while preserving literal model-id precedence and provider/auth fallback behavior.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(agent): resolve compaction model alias to canonical model ref
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90885 by keeping the patch focused on embedded-agent-runner compaction model selection. Preserve Pick-cat attribution, resolve failing checks if branch-caused, hydrate and address comments/review-bot findings, run Codex /review, and rerun pnpm check:changed before any merge recommendation.
credit_notes: Preserve Pick-cat as source contributor for https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/90885.
